---
title: "Intro Biostatistics Resources"
listing:
  - id: Tutorials
    contents: "Tutorial*.qmd"
    type: grid
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: Extra-Practice
    contents: "*practice.qmd"
    type: table
    categories: true
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: shiny-apps
    contents: "*shiny*.qmd"
    type: grid
    categories: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: rainbow.jpg
title-block-banner-color: "black"
---

## R Tutorials

::: {#Tutorials}
:::

## Extra R Practice

::: {#Extra-Practice}
:::

## Shiny Apps

::: {#shiny-apps}
:::
